name: chr19_19q13_43_subtelomeric_SD
description: 19q13.43 most-distal subtelomeric SD field (last ~500 kb of chromosome 19q). Contains TRIM28-adjacent ZNF paralogs (ZNF274, ZNF548, ZIM2/3, PEG3 imprinted region) and shared subtelomeric duplicons with multiple other subtelomeres; very SD-dense terminal cap.

architecture.internal_structure: Mosaic 5-50 kb subtelomeric duplicons at 95-99% identity shared with subtelomeres of multiple other chromosomes; terminal ZIM2/PEG3 imprinted cluster; characteristic terminal SD enrichment of chr19.
